        rgba

      • withOpacity(c: Color; opacity: float32): Color

Color model. A 32-bit ARGB value packed into a uint32, mirroring Flutter's dart:ui Color. The byte order is 0xAARRGGBB: alpha in the highest 8 bits, then red, green, blue.

All operations are pure: they return new Color values rather than mutating inputs.

Types

Color = object
  value*: uint32
A 32-bit packed ARGB color value. Read components via alpha, red, green, blue. Build via rgb, rgba, fromARGB, fromHex, or pick a constant like colorRed.

Consts

colorAmber = (value: 4294951175'u)
colorBlack = (value: 4278190080'u)
colorBlue = (value: 4280391411'u)
Material blue 500. 
colorBlueGrey = (value: 4284513675'u)
colorBrown = (value: 4286141768'u)
colorCyan = (value: 4278238420'u)
colorGreen = (value: 4283215696'u)
Material green 500. 
colorGrey = (value: 4288585374'u)
colorIndigo = (value: 4282339765'u)
colorOrange = (value: 4294940672'u)
colorPink = (value: 4293467747'u)
colorPurple = (value: 4288423856'u)
colorRed = (value: 4294198070'u)
Material red 500. 
colorTeal = (value: 4278228616'u)
colorTransparent = (value: 0'u)
Fully transparent black. Default for unset color fields. 
colorWhite = (value: 4294967295'u)
colorYellow = (value: 4294961979'u)

Procs

proc `$`(c: Color): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Hex string in "#AARRGGBB" form. 
proc `==`(a, b: Color): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Two colors are equal when their packed values match. 
proc alpha(c: Color): uint8 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extracts the alpha channel (0 = transparent, 255 = opaque). 
proc blue(c: Color): uint8 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extracts the blue channel. 
proc color(value: uint32): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a Color from a raw 0xAARRGGBB integer. 
proc fromARGB(a, r, g, b: uint8): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a Color from ARGB components in Flutter's argument order. 
proc fromHex(hex: string): Color {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parses a CSS-style hex string. Accepts "#RRGGBB", "#AARRGGBB", "RRGGBB", or "AARRGGBB". Six-character inputs are taken as fully opaque. Raises ValueError for any other length. 
proc green(c: Color): uint8 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extracts the green channel. 
proc lerp(a, b: Color; t: float32): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Linear interpolation between two colors, component-wise. t = 0 returns a, t = 1 returns b. Each channel is clamped to [0, 255] so out-of-range t values are safe. 
proc opacity(c: Color): float32 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns the alpha channel as a 0..1 float. 
proc red(c: Color): uint8 {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extracts the red channel. 
proc rgb(r, g, b: uint8): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds an opaque Color (alpha 255). 
proc rgba(r, g, b, a: uint8): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Builds a Color from four 0..255 channels. 
proc withAlpha(c: Color; a: uint8): Color {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Returns a copy of c with the alpha channel set to a. Red, green, blue are preserved. 
proc withOpacity(c: Color; opacity: float32): Color {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Returns a copy of c with the alpha channel REPLACED by clamp(opacity, 0, 1) * 255. Matches Flutter's Color.withOpacity: the original alpha is discarded.
